name: zenify-my-terminal
description: Set up a fast, calm, focused terminal on macOS. Two modes — guided (walks through choices: terminal between WezTerm/Ghostty/Alacritty/Kitty/iTerm2/Apple Terminal, prompt between Starship/Oh My Posh, plugins, optional extras) or fast-track (one question — which terminal — then opinionated optimal defaults). Writes ~/.zshrc + chosen prompt config + chosen terminal config with macOS gotchas already handled (skip `brew shellenv`, dead `homebrew/command-not-found` tap, BSD ls, sub-process PATH, zinit turbo mode). Ends with a cheat-sheet of what was installed and the most important keyboard shortcuts.
